title: Farmetica
description: A mod that caters farming in the version 1.8.9 and makes the experience better.
body:
**Farmetica**

Farmetica is a Minecraft mod designed to enhance your farming experience by altering the hitboxes of crops. Inspired by the hitbox mechanics of Minecraft version 1.12, this mod aims to bring back the precise and user-friendly crop hitbox design from that version, allowing for more accurate and efficient farming.

Features
Classic Hitboxes for Crops:

1. Reintroduces the hitbox design from Minecraft 1.12 for all crops.

2. Makes it easier to interact with crops without accidentally breaking adjacent blocks.

Future updates will introduce additional features aimed at further improving agricultural mechanics and overall gameplay, ensuring that Farmetica continues to grow and evolve alongside your Minecraft adventures.
